DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR IN DEPT. 302 ON THE SAME DATE. JUDGE PRO TEM: PAUL RENNE; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT OF THE JUDGMENT THROUGH AUG-31-2012, IN AN AMOUNT NOT GREATER THAN $2,322.00. NO WITHHOLDING ON EARNINGS FOR MONTHS OF SEPTEMBER AND OCTOBER 2012. STARTING NOVEMBER 1, 2012, EARNINGS WITHHOLDING ORDER SHALL BE $474.00 PER MONTH; IF JUDGMENT DEBTOR PAID TWICE PER MONTH, THEN $237.00 PER PAY PERIOD SHALL BE WITHHELD FROM JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S EARNINGS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption, Moving Party: San Francisco Federal Credit Union
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: gary l. fertig, esq., fertig law offices, 510.521.1400, for plaintiff san francisco federal credit union.
annette gargollo, 415.335.8356, defendant appearing in pro per.

RULING: after parties met and conferred outside courtroom, The Court vacated its tentative ruling. plaintiff san francisco federal credit union's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is denied. the levying officer is directed to release any earnings held to the judgment creditor for payment of the judgment through aug-31-2012, in an amount not greater than $2,322.00. No withholding on earnings for months of september and october 2012. starting november 1, 2012, earnings withholding order shall be $474.00 per month; if judgment debtor paid twice per month, then $237.00 per pay period shall be withheld from judgment debtor's earnings. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077.

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Sep-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO FEDERAL CREDIT UNION's Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is transferred to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on the law and motion calendar in department 302 on the same date. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported

Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption (Part 2 Of 2 Of Tentative Ruling).
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff San Francisco Federal Credit Union'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption IS A DUPLICATE ENTRY.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Gary L. Fertib, Esq. apecial appearance for the Plaintiff: San Francisco Federal Credit Union.
Plaintiff's Witness Lind Seals was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendants Annette S. and Robert M. Gargollo.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:
Principal - $11,084.23
Prejudgment Interest - $1000.16
Attorney Fees - 2500.00
Costs - $542.50
Total - $15,146.89
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-13-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-30-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
